message:
test(treap): expand Treap data structure test coverage

Add 8 new test cases covering edge cases and operations that were
previously untested in the randomized treap implementation:

- contains_key on empty treap returns false
- get() for nonexistent keys in a populated treap
- remove() of root node when it has two children, verifying
  correct re-linking and remaining element accessibility
- kth() after multiple interleaved removals (removes evens 2-10,
  verifies odd-indexed access 1,3,5,7,9)
- rank() matches expected sorted index for randomly-ordered
  insertions
- keys() correctly reflects state after multiple removals
- with_seed() produces identical sorted key order regardless
  of seed value (tests BST invariant independence from priority)
- serde roundtrip on empty treap preserves is_empty/len/min/max

Also fix a minor type annotation: change wildcard `_` to explicit
`()` in kth() return destructuring for clarity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
